title: More than 100,000 illegal cockroaches were seized from an Australian breeder | AP News
og:description: Australian officials say they confiscated more than 100,000 illegal live cockroaches from a breeder in May in the country's largest-ever seizure of exotic invertebrates.
og:title: Australian cockroach kingpin caught with 100,000 illegal insects in record bug bust
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/illegal-cockroaches-seized-australia-madagascar-hissing-dubia-e35889bf7910169f6bd091e34b35e029","dateModified":"2026-06-05T06:27:21Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T04:48:51Z","description":"Australian officials say they confiscated more than 100,000 illegal live cockroaches from a breeder in May in the country's largest-ever seizure of exotic invertebrates. The haul, worth over $140,000, included Madagascar hissing and dubia cockroaches. Both species are illegal to import, keep or sell in Australia due to potential environmental risks. The cockroaches were being sold online as reptile food. Officials urged pet owners to use crickets or wood roaches instead. The seized cockroaches will be euthanized, and authorities warned of prosecutions for those caught with such invertebrates. title: Half of Latin Americans deported from US to Congo return home | AP News
og:description: More than half the 15 Latin Americans deported to Congo under the Trump administration's immigration crackdown have returned to their home countries.
og:title: More than half of Latin Americans deported from US to Congo are now back home

title: Ex-Prince Andrew made money subletting on his rent-free estate | AP News
og:description: A report by Britain's public spending watchdog shows that the former Prince Andrew made money by subletting cottages on the estate where he lived rent-free for two decades.

title: Federal judge overturns Trump administration policy affecting immigrants | AP News
og:description: A federal judge has struck down a Trump administration policy enacted after the shooting of two National Guard members that made it harder for immigrants from dozens of countries to stay and enter the country.
og:title: A federal judge strikes down Trump administration immigration policy affecting 39 countries

title: Judge blocks Trump-backed red snapper season | AP News
og:description: A federal judge in Washington has blocked a plan to loosen rules for fishing red snapper in the Atlantic, halting what was expected to be the longest recreational snapper season in years.

title: Man sentenced to life in 'au pair affair' murder case | AP News
og:description: A Virginia man who was having an affair with the family’s au pair has been sentenced to life in prison without parole for the murder of his wife and a man who was lured to the couple’s home as a fall guy.
og:title: Virginia man gets life in prison for double murder scheme in affair with au pair
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/au-pair-affair-murder-sentence-brendan-banfield-b28c0b8d57a0faac3a7264b210b86e63","dateModified":"2026-06-06T01:42:49Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T11:58:02Z","description":"A Virginia man who was having an affair with the family’s au pair has been sentenced to life in prison without parole for the murder of his wife and a man who was lured to the couple’s home as a fall guy. title: Senate OKs $70B immigration enforcement bill without Trump fund limits | AP News
og:description: The Senate has passed legislation to fund President Donald Trump’s immigration enforcement agencies, sending it to the House.
og:title: Senate OKs $70B immigration bill after rejecting efforts to permanently ban Trump's settlement fund
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-settlement-fund-ice-border-patrol-vote-93b9f5b487997b629d87bf59a046d7ec","dateModified":"2026-06-05T15:11:59Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T05:20:37Z","description":"The Senate has passed legislation to fund President Donald Trump’s immigration enforcement agencies, sending it to the House. The Friday morning passage came after weeks of delays and fierce backlash to an unrelated $1.776 billion settlement fund that threatened to derail the bill. Senators voted for the $70 billion legislation to fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Border Patrol for the next three years, through the end of Trump’s term. The final vote came after Republicans narrowly defeated multiple attempts to add language to the bill that would permanently ban Trump’s settlement fund to compensate allies who believe they've been politically persecuted. title: Democrat Xavier Becerra advances in California governor's race | AP News
og:description: Democrat Xavier Becerra has advanced to the general election for California governor after pitching himself as an experienced choice to lead the nation’s most populous state.

title: FBI analysts tied to 'Catholic ideology' memo told they're being fired | AP News
og:description: Several FBI analysts tied to the creation of a 2023 memo warning of a potential threat from Catholic “violent extremists” were told Friday that they were being fired, the latest wave of terminations under the leadership of Director Kash Patel.
og:title: FBI analysts tied to disputed 'Catholic ideology' memo told they're being fired, AP sources say
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/fbi-kash-patel-firings-e9793d06e6310bfcd848b55bf8c47cc6","dateModified":"2026-06-05T22:34:04Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T22:06:56Z","description":"Several FBI analysts tied to the creation of a 2023 memo warning of a potential threat from Catholic “violent extremists” were told Friday that they were being fired, the latest wave of terminations under the leadership of Director Kash Patel. That's according to three people familiar with the matter who spoke to The Associated Press on the condition of anonymity. The FBI declined to comment. Two of the people said those fired included four analysts and a supervisory analysts. The January 2023 intelligence product produced by analysts in the FBI’s Richmond field office emerged as a political flashpoint after it was issued, with Republicans in Congress repeatedly citing it as part of their broader contention that the FBI during the Biden administration was targeting conservatives.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":653,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6dafb80/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5687x3791+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F1b%2Fb4%2F917caa957c3fd835306ee4114758%2Ff6885fce9e2348bea2b51ed0f437cc53","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/6dafb80/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5687x3791+0+0/resize/980x653!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F1b%2Fb4%2F917caa957c3fd835306ee4114758%2Ff6885fce9e2348bea2b51ed0f437cc53","width":980}],"name":"FBI analysts tied to 'Catholic ideology' memo told they're being fired | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/fbi-kash-patel-firings-e9793d06e6310bfcd848b55bf8c47cc6"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Tucker covers national security in Washington for The Associated Press, with a focus on the FBI and Justice Department.","email":"etucker@ap.org","image":{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/1d/b6/724933dd415abc92e4af0701011b/tucker2-1jm9337.jpg"},"jobTitle":"National security reporter","name":"Eric Tucker","url":"https://apnews.com/author/eric-tucker"},{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Richer covers the Justice Department and federal courts. title: Brayden McNabb's Stanley Cup Final status unclear after taking puck to face | AP News
og:description: The status of Vegas Golden Knights defenseman Brayden McNabb moving forward in the Stanley Cup Final is unclear after he took a puck to the face in Game 2.

jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/brayden-mcnabb-puck-to-face-12d6e47cb95daeab843f6c1470fa857d","dateModified":"2026-06-05T14:51:49Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T04:23:41Z","description":"The status of Vegas Golden Knights defenseman Brayden McNabb moving forward in the Stanley Cup Final is unclear after he took a puck to the face in Game 2. Coach John Tortorella had no update on McNabb on Friday other than to confirm the 35-year-old was traveling home with the team. Game 3 is Saturday in Las Vegas. McNabb left Thursday night's game after taking an 87.3 mph slap shot from Nikolaj Ehlers square in the face just past the midway point of the first period. McNabb dropped his stick, went down to the ice and grabbed his nose as he skated immediately off and down the tunnel. og:title: Taylor Swift's 'Toy Story 5' song is a return to pop country
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/taylor-swift-toy-story-5-song-country-4972fab971762d7f2404d65ca0690d55","dateModified":"2026-06-05T14:50:30Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T13:51:43Z","description":"Taylor Swift has released a new song for Disney and Pixar's “Toy Story 5.” The track, “I Knew It, I Knew You,” marks a soft return to her country-pop roots. The song features some elements inextricable from the country genre like live instrumentation, plucky banjo and harmonica that opens the track. The song is co-produced by Jack Antonoff, her frequent collaborator. Last weekend, billboards with “TS” appeared in major cities, hinting at the release. title: A brutal tech-led sell-off slams Wall Street in its worst day since October | AP News
og:description: The U.S. stock market had its worst day since October as a sell-off in big technology companies weighed down the broader market.
og:title: Stocks slump as Big Tech sinks and a strong May jobs report boosts odds for higher interest rates
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/stocks-markets-iran-oil-trump-b5e10863b81cb1d6399f688ad8885c46","dateModified":"2026-06-05T22:15:17Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T05:03:35Z","description":"The U.S. stock market had its worst day since October as a sell-off in big technology companies weighed down the broader market. Nvidia and Broadcom were among the heaviest weights on the market. The Labor Department reported that employers added 172,000 jobs in May, roughly double what forecasters had expected. og:title: Astronauts briefly take shelter during repair to fix leak on the International Space Station
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/international-space-station-leak-ccc50acb3fbe2ab190dde3f1a7a26478","dateModified":"2026-06-05T18:00:02Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T15:22:37Z","description":"Astronauts aboard the International Space Station have briefly taken shelter during a repair to fix a new leak. title: Is inflation a red state/blue state issue? It's increasing either way | AP News
og:description: Inflation is rising again, squeezing budgets and making essentials harder to afford. Inflation hit 3.8% in April, the highest in three years.
og:title: FACT FOCUS: Is inflation a red state vs. blue state issue? It's increasing no matter how you cut it
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/inflation-blue-states-fact-check-9cb276119b4dcaa9e433106cc29ca3a1","dateModified":"2026-06-05T22:57:12Z","datePublished":"2026-06-05T17:57:59Z","description":"Inflation is rising again, squeezing budgets and making essentials harder to afford. Inflation hit 3.8% in April, the highest in three years. Larry Kudlow asked Kevin Hassett about this on Fox Business. The director of the National Economic Council claimed inflation is “on a deep downward dive,” especially if blue states are excluded. However, experts say this is false. Inflation is high across all regions, driven by rising gas prices from Middle Eastern conflicts. The Labor Department’s data shows both blue and red states experiencing high inflation. title: Live frog surprises housemates in Australian farmer's lettuce bag | AP News
og:description: An Australian farmer has found a live frog in a bag of lettuce. Laura Jones said on Tuesday one of her house mates in Esperance in Western Australia state found the frog inside a sealed plastic bag he’d bought from a supermarket.

title: 2 adventurers take 'the most unsuitable car' on a 14,000-mile journey | AP News
og:description: Two friends have claimed a bizarre record by driving a decades-old British three-wheel car about 14,000 miles from the U.K. to the southern tip of Africa for the longest trip by a three-wheel vehicle.
og:title: How 2 men claimed an absurd record by driving an old 3-wheel car the length of Africa
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/adventure-car-africa-record-reliant-robin-0328f6a9dbcb407d539fe7aabf23a915","dateModified":"2026-04-22T10:59:12Z","datePublished":"2026-04-22T02:03:32Z","description":"Two friends have claimed a bizarre record by driving a decades-old British three-wheel car about 14,000 miles from the U.K. to the southern tip of Africa for the longest trip by a three-wheel vehicle. Englishman Ollie Jenks and Canadian Seth Scott took the Reliant Robin they named Sheila on the four-and-a-half month journey through 22 countries. Jenks says the adventure cost about $40,000 to $50,000. There were countless breakdowns and brushes with danger, but the tenacious pair and Sheila made it to Cape Town, South Africa, last month. Jenks says the plan pitched by Scott was “so ridiculous I couldn’t say no.”","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":645,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/f346ef8/2147483647/strip/false/crop/9208x6056+0+0/resize/980x645!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F5c%2Feb%2F11dcd8aec3e1bc3bc7d48099cae7%2F3a45b6139f0e4811b83b67069b3ba3f8","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/f346ef8/2147483647/strip/false/crop/9208x6056+0+0/resize/980x645!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F5c%2Feb%2F11dcd8aec3e1bc3bc7d48099cae7%2F3a45b6139f0e4811b83b67069b3ba3f8","width":980}],"name":"2 adventurers take 'the most unsuitable car' on a 14,000-mile journey | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/adventure-car-africa-record-reliant-robin-0328f6a9dbcb407d539fe7aabf23a915"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","name":"Gerald Imray","url":"https://apnews.com/author/gerald-imray"}],"publisher":{"@type":"Organization","name":"AP News","logo":{"@type":"ImageObject","url":"https://assets.apnews.com/19/66/bc546486408c8595f01753a9fbeb/ap-logo-176-by-208.svg"}},"articleSection":["Oddities"],"keywords":["Ollie Jenks","Seth Scott","Cape Town","Africa","United Kingdom","General news","adventure car africa record reliant robin","Graeme Hurst","Endangered species","World news","Oddities","Business","World News"],"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/f346ef8/2147483647/strip/false/crop/9208x6056+0+0/resize/980x645!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2F5c%2Feb%2F11dcd8aec3e1bc3bc7d48099cae7%2F3a45b6139f0e4811b83b67069b3ba3f8","headline":"2 adventurers take 'the most unsuitable car' on a 14,000-mile journey"}]

title: Argentine teens say they identify themselves as non-human animals in latest viral trend | AP News
og:description: Argentine teens are gathering in Buenos Aires parks to dress and act like non-human animals. The so-called “therian” trend is exploding online with Argentina leading all other Latin American countries in engagement.
og:title: Viral phenomenon in Argentina has young people identifying themselves as animals
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/argentina-teenagers-identifying-as-animals-therians-tiktok-54d158c4842f6515e31d83a260cdf31f","dateModified":"2026-02-27T05:00:46Z","datePublished":"2026-02-27T05:00:46Z","description":"Argentine teens are gathering in Buenos Aires parks to dress and act like non-human animals. The so-called “therian” trend is exploding online with Argentina leading all other Latin American countries in engagement. On a recent Sunday, some teenagers were running on all fours in masks, while others climbed trees, keeping their distance from curious onlookers. Many say they identify mentally or spiritually with animals. Others say they do it for fun and community. TikTok drives much of the growth, and Argentina leads the region in engagement. Some people react with laughter or anger. Psychologist Débora Pedace says it stays symbolic for most teens. She says it becomes concerning only if it turns into a fixed belief and leads to harm.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":639,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/75a6d05/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7217x4707+0+0/resize/980x639!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff0%2Fa1%2F1f2705884a86be1954e48b019ce5%2F4c30a334befd45deaea6524ade1bcacf","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/75a6d05/2147483647/strip/false/crop/7217x4707+0+0/resize/980x639!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Ff0%2Fa1%2F1f2705884a86be1954e48b019ce5%2F4c30a334befd45deaea6524ade1bcacf","width":980}],"name":"Argentine title: Humpback whale swallows kayaker before releasing him: Video | AP News
og:description: A humpback whale briefly swallowed a kayaker off Chilean Patagonia before quickly releasing him unharmed. The incident was caught on video.
og:title: A humpback whale briefly swallows kayaker in Chilean Patagonia — and it's all captured on camera
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/chile-kayaking-tourism-whale-b0cafde4b640326f20a9da28003d6c26","dateModified":"2025-02-14T00:22:48Z","datePublished":"2025-02-13T17:16:39Z","description":"A humpback whale briefly swallowed a kayaker off Chilean Patagonia before quickly releasing him unharmed. title: What will happen to Nipper, a dog statue on a New York warehouse | AP News
og:description: Albany residents love Nipper, a giant dog statue perched atop a warehouse for nearly seven decades. This 28-foot statue depicting the famous RCA dog listening to a phonograph has become a local icon.
og:title: Nipper, stay! The future of a beloved dog statue on a New York warehouse is up in the air
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/nipper-dog-statue-albany-new-york-69a5ca4ec514f837626475b5d5264c1d","dateModified":"2026-04-30T10:01:08Z","datePublished":"2026-04-30T10:01:08Z","description":"Albany residents love Nipper, a giant dog statue perched atop a warehouse for nearly seven decades. This 28-foot statue depicting the famous RCA dog listening to a phonograph has become a local icon. Parents point it out to kids, and Nipper merchandise is popular. However, that pride is now tempered with concern for Nipper’s future. title: Resident killed in Sri Lankan nursing home fire had been 'chained,' worker says | AP News
og:description: A staff member says a resident killed in a fire at an unregistered nursing home in western Sri Lanka had been chained and another was untied and saved.

title: Fishers celebrate Trump seafood order but environmentalists fear overfishing | AP News
og:description: President Donald Trump’s executive order to boost the U.S. commercial fishing industry drew praise from commercial fishing groups and condemnation from environmental organizations.
og:title: Fishers celebrate Trump's seafood order while conservation groups fear overfishing
jsonld: [{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"NewsArticle","url":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-seafood-fishing-executive-order-pacific-14793f6b00adb48f9510dc9ed5c1a0f1","dateModified":"2025-04-18T18:48:25Z","datePublished":"2025-04-18T17:05:14Z","description":"President Donald Trump’s executive order to boost the U.S. commercial fishing industry drew praise from commercial fishing groups and condemnation from environmental organizations. Those critics say they fear cutting regulations will harm fish populations that have already dwindled in some areas of the oceans. Trump says his Thursday order will help the U.S. commercial fishing industry by peeling back regulations and opening up harvesting in previously protected areas, starting with a broad swath of the Pacific Ocean. The order represents a dramatic shift in federal policy regulating fishing in U.S. waters, putting the priorities of commercial fishing interests ahead of federal efforts to allow the supply of fish to make a comeback.","image":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"ImageObject","height":648,"thumbnailUrl":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/d07f5cc/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5626x3722+0+0/resize/980x648!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fe1%2F5b%2F30f5fd6cd3f1c3a1554576657917%2F93b63b026e414819b4a0374dddb25d26","url":"https://dims.apnews.com/dims4/default/d07f5cc/2147483647/strip/false/crop/5626x3722+0+0/resize/980x648!/quality/90/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fassets.apnews.com%2Fe1%2F5b%2F30f5fd6cd3f1c3a1554576657917%2F93b63b026e414819b4a0374dddb25d26","width":980}],"name":"Fishers celebrate Trump seafood order but environmentalists fear overfishing | AP News","mainEntityOfPage":{"@type":"WebPage","@id":"https://apnews.com/article/trump-seafood-fishing-executive-order-pacific-14793f6b00adb48f9510dc9ed5c1a0f1"},"author":[{"@context":"http://schema.org","@type":"Person","description":"Whittle is an Associated Press reporter based in Portland, Maine.
